channel.title: Waythrough Project Blog
channel.description: Practical guidance for navigating affordable housing programs, tenant rights, and the barriers that stand in the way.

item.title: What Happens After You Get Your Housing Voucher
item.description: You got your voucher — now what? The apartment search, inspections, landlord negotiations, and everything you need to know about actually using your voucher.
item.author: matt@waythroughproject.com (Matt)

item.title: How to Talk to Your Landlord About Repairs Without Risking Retaliation
item.description: Practical strategies for getting repairs done while protecting yourself. When to call, when to write, and what to do if your landlord pushes back.
item.author: matt@waythroughproject.com (Matt)

item.title: Understanding Utility Allowances and Why They Matter
item.description: Utility allowances directly affect how much rent you pay on Section 8. Here's what they are, how they work, and what to do if yours doesn't match reality.
item.author: matt@waythroughproject.com (Matt)

item.title: What to Do If Your Benefits Get Cut
item.description: If your SSI, SSDI, SNAP, or housing benefits were reduced or cut off, here are the steps to take right now — including how to appeal and where to get help.
item.author: matt@waythroughproject.com (Matt)

item.title: Section 8 Explained — What It Actually Is and How It Works
item.description: A clear, no-nonsense breakdown of the Section 8 Housing Choice Voucher program — what it is, who qualifies, and how the process actually works from someone who's seen it firsthand.
item.author: matt@waythroughproject.com (Matt)

item.title: What to Do When a Landlord Rejects Your Voucher
item.description: Landlord won't accept your Section 8 voucher? Here's what you can do about it — your rights, your options, and how to keep moving forward.
item.author: matt@waythroughproject.com (Matt)

item.title: 5 Affordable Housing Programs Most People Don't Know About
item.description: Section 8 isn't your only option. Here are five federal housing programs that could help you — and that most people have never heard of.
item.author: matt@waythroughproject.com (Matt)

item.title: Welcome to Waythrough Project
item.description: Learn why Waythrough Project was started and what you can expect to find here to help navigate the affordable housing system.
item.author: matt@waythroughproject.com (Matt)
